content.body: In https://tc39.es/ecma262/#sec-serializejsonproperty, step 11.b.i (from PR #3826) is "Assert: value is an Array. value is not a Proxy." This is odd for a couple reasons: (a) It's odd to have an Assert followed by two separate assertions. (Normally we'd connect them with "and" or make them to separate Asserts.) Note that esmeta is also confused by this construction. (b) Once you assert that value is an Array, then by definition it's not a Proxy.
(That step wasn't there when I reviewed the PR.)
